product_title: Audio Technica Ath-m50xbt2 Wireless Over‑ear Headphones With Bluetooth
consensus_summary: The ATH-M50xBT2 are well-regarded professional-grade wireless headphones praised for excellent sound quality, comfort, and build durability. Users appreciate the 40-hour battery life and reliable Bluetooth connectivity. Some criticisms emerge around occasional connectivity issues and that the sound profile favors studio use over casual listening.
pros: Excellent sound quality with balanced frequency response
Good noise isolation for closed-back design
cons: Sound tuning optimized for studio work, not casual use
Relatively heavy compared to consumer models
Can feel isolating in social settings due to sealed design
red_flags: Some users report ear fatigue during extended use
